name: WH40K TTS Mod вҖ” Dice В· Attack В· Turns В· HP В· Teams В· FTC
description:
Adds a full suite of Warhammer 40K tools to any TTS table:

рҹҺІ Dice Roller вҖ” panel + Dice Mat auto-announce
вҡ” Attack вҖ” HitвҶ’WoundвҶ’SaveвҶ’Damage calculator
рҹӣЎ Save вҖ” armour save roller
рҹ’Җ Battleshock вҖ” morale / Battleshock test
вҸұ Turn Tracker вҖ” 6 WH40K phases with round counter
вқӨ Wound Tracker вҖ” model-aware HP (damage fills front model first)
рҹ‘Ҙ Teams вҖ” FFA / 2v1 / 2v2 / 3v2 / 3v3 / 3-Team match formats
рҹ“ң Yelloscribe вҖ” in-game browser to yelloscribe.com
вҡҷ FTC Compat вҖ” full Free the Codex integration (auto-detected)
вқ“ Help вҖ” scrollable in-game help panel

FTC COMPATIBILITY: Load Free the Codex first вҖ” this script detects it automatically. Turn tracker hands off to FTC; Teams panel syncs active army from FTC turn events; вҡҷ FTC toolbar button imports FTC unit HP into the wound tracker.

Type !help in chat or click вқ“ Help for a full command reference.
